complete this technical plan built by claude

## Requirements Readiness

**Overall:** Sufficient

**Sources reviewed:**
- Spec doc (wiki): Not available — not required for this scope
- Design (Figma): Not available — not required, changes are mechanical
- Work item description: Clear and complete — specifies source URL, target URL, Forbes banner source, and exact copy change
- Parent/child work items: None linked
- Prior art: `page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php` demonstrates the exact pattern for adding a Forbes linkbar to a page variant

**Gaps and clarifications needed:**
- None — all information needed to implement is present

**Plan confidence:** High — straightforward LP dupe with two well-defined additions

## Context and Goal

Duplicate the Enhanced PDP (`mens-opt/testosterone-1`) to a new Forbes-targeted variant at `mens-opt/forbes/testosterone`. Add the Forbes linkbar banner and update one line of copy. Intended for A/B testing Forbes ad traffic against the Enhanced PDP.

## Design

**New slug:** `mens-opt-forbes-testosterone`

All four naming artifacts must match exactly per convention.

**Files to create:**

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/page-mens-opt-forbes-testosterone.php` | Copy of `page-mens-opt-enhanced-pdp.php` with 3 targeted changes |
| `src/static/scss/pages/mens-opt-forbes-testosterone.scss` | Copy of `mens-opt-enhanced-pdp.scss` with root selector renamed + linkbar color |
| `src/static/js/pages/mens-opt-forbes-testosterone.bundle.js` | Copy of `mens-opt-enhanced-pdp.bundle.js` — identical logic, no changes needed |

**File to modify:**

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/functions.php` | Add `'mens-opt-forbes-testosterone'` to `HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES` array |

**PHP template changes (vs source `page-mens-opt-enhanced-pdp.php`):**

1. Template header — change template name and slug:
   - `// Template Name: Mens OPT Forbes Testosterone`
   - `$template_name = 'mens-opt-forbes-testosterone';`

2. Add Forbes linkbar — add `$linkbar_vars` to global declaration, set value, and include template part after `get_header()`:
   - `$linkbar_vars = ['linkbar_content' => 'Seen in Forbes Health Best TRT Clinic of 2025'];`
   - `require_once get_template_directory() . '/template-parts/linkbar.php';`

3. Copy update in the `.alternatives` section:
   - From: "Needle-free testosterone options available with the At-Home Testosterone Testing Kit"
   - To: "Needle-free testosterone options available with the Testosterone Test"

**SCSS changes:** Replace root selector `.mens-opt-enhanced-pdp` → `.mens-opt-forbes-testosterone` throughout, and add linkbar text color:
```
.linkbar a {
    color: #0e0b20;
}
```

**WordPress admin (manual step):** Create a new page in WP admin with:
- Slug: `testosterone`
- Parent page: `mens-opt/forbes`
- Page template: "Mens OPT Forbes Testosterone"

This produces the URL: `https://buy.honehealth.com/mens-opt/forbes/testosterone`

## Testing

- Build: run `yarn build` from theme directory, verify no compile errors
- Spot check on staging:
  - Forbes linkbar appears at top with correct text
  - Updated copy reads "Testosterone Test" in the alternatives section
  - All carousels, videos, FAQs, and CTAs function identically to the source page
- Verify `mens-opt/testosterone-1` is unaffected

## Architecture Review

Not needed. Content/template duplication with no new systems, no schema changes, no data model changes, no core service changes, and no impact on shared infrastructure or user journeys beyond adding a new URL.

## Agent Executability Assessment

**Overall:** Fully executable

**Executable by agent:**
- PHP template file creation: mechanical copy + 3 targeted changes, all well-defined
- SCSS file creation: copy + single root class rename + one style addition
- JS bundle file creation: identical copy, no changes
- `functions.php` update: add one string to an array — well-defined pattern

**Requires human:**
- WordPress admin page creation: must be done manually in WP admin to set parent page, slug, and template assignment
- Post-deploy verification: spot check on staging/prod

**Prerequisites for agent execution:**
- None — no dependent PRs, no data fixes, no blocked work

## Agent Confidence Assessment

**Task type:** New feature
**Estimated complexity:** Low
**Agentibility:** Agent-ready
**Rationale:** Mechanical LP duplication with well-defined file patterns, clear source files to copy, and two targeted content changes. All changes follow established patterns in the codebase.
**Suggested next step:** Assign to agent for code implementation; human handles WP admin page creation and post-deploy spot check.

<?php
/**
 * HoneLandingPages functions and definitions
 */

// Theme setup
function hone_landing_theme_setup() {
    // Add theme support for title tag
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    
    // Add theme support for post thumbnails
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'hone_landing_theme_setup');

// Disable Sitemaps
add_filter( 'wp_sitemaps_enabled', '__return_false' );

/**
 * List of templates that have page-specific CSS files
 * Template names match both $class_names[] in page templates and compiled CSS filenames
 */
define('HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES', [
    'article-hrt-overview',
    'article-trt',
    'article-trt-new-copy',
    'article-trt-old-design-new-copy',
    'article-trt-pmax',

    'overview-pricing-variant-b',
    'overview-tiktok',

    'womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax',
    'womens-hormone-imbalance-tt',
    'womens-menopause',
    'womens-menopause-tt',
    'womens-opt-light-touch',
    'womens-second-funnel',
]);

// Enqueue styles and scripts
function hone_landing_enqueue_assets() {
    global $class_names;

    $theme_version = wp_get_theme()->get('Version');
    $theme_uri = get_template_directory_uri();

    // Always load main.min.css - contains all common styles (reset, settings, parts)
    wp_enqueue_style(
        'hone-main-style',
        $theme_uri . '/static/css/main.min.css',
        array(),
        $theme_version
    );

    // Early return if no class_names set
    if (empty($class_names) || !is_array($class_names)) {
        return;
    }

    // Check if this template has page-specific styles
    $matches = array_intersect($class_names, HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES);

    // Load all matching page-specific styles in order
    // This allows for layered styles (e.g., base 'mens-hrt-aol' + specific 'mens-hrt-aol-forbes')
    if (!empty($matches)) {
        $dependencies = array('hone-main-style'); // First match depends on main styles
        
        foreach ($matches as $matched_class) {
            $css_file = get_template_directory() . '/static/css/pages/' . $matched_class . '.css';
            if (file_exists($css_file)) {
                wp_enqueue_style(
                    'hone-page-' . $matched_class,
                    $theme_uri . '/static/css/pages/' . $matched_class . '.css',
                    $dependencies,
                    $theme_version,
                    'all'
                );
                // Make next stylesheet depend on this one to maintain load order
                $dependencies = array('hone-page-' . $matched_class);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Enqueue main JavaScript (always loaded - contains trackQuizEvent)
    wp_enqueue_script(
        'hone-main-script',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/combined.js',
        array(),
        $theme_version,
        true
    );
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'hone_landing_enqueue_assets');

/**
 * Register page-specific JavaScript bundles
 * 
 * These bundles are built with esbuild and include all dependencies
 * (except jQuery which is loaded via WordPress).
 * 
 * Each bundle includes: Slick carousel + relevant utilities
 * 
 * Usage in templates:
 *   wp_enqueue_script('hone-page-article-trt-new-copy');
 */
function hone_register_bundles() {
    $theme_version = wp_get_theme()->get('Version');
    $theme_uri = get_template_directory_uri();
    $theme_dir = get_template_directory();
    
    // Register jQuery Migrate (dependency for Slick)
    wp_register_script(
        'jquery-migrate',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/jquery-migrate-1.2.1.min.js',
        array('jquery'),
        '1.2.1',
        true
    );
    
    // Register Slick carousel
    wp_register_script(
        'slick-carousel',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/slick.min.js',
        array('jquery', 'jquery-migrate'),
        '1.8.1',
        true
    );
    
    // Register each page bundle with jQuery, jQuery Migrate, and Slick as dependencies
    foreach (HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES as $page) {
        $bundle_path = $theme_dir . '/static/js/dist/pages/' . $page . '.bundle.min.js';
        $bundle_url = $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/pages/' . $page . '.bundle.min.js';
        if (file_exists($bundle_path)) {
            wp_register_script(
                'hone-page-' . $page,
                $bundle_url,
                array('jquery', 'jquery-migrate', 'slick-carousel'),
                $theme_version,
                true
            );
        }
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'hone_register_bundles', 5);

// the current LPs had funky urls and we need to match them exactly so that the ads don't get reset
// The pages in wp-admin need to be set with these specific slugs and cannot have a parent page.
remove_filter('template_redirect', 'redirect_canonical');
add_action('init', function() {
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-3', 'top');
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/hormone-optimization/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-3-hormone-optimization', 'top');    
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/rww/tiktok/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-tiktok', 'top');        
});

add_filter('query_vars', function($vars) {
    $vars[] = 'pagename';
    return $vars;
});

function get_query_string(){
    $query_params = [];
    foreach ($_GET as $key => $value) {
        $query_params[$key] = sanitize_text_field($value);
    }
    return http_build_query($query_params);
}
